title: Autoencoders & Bottleneck Architectures
summary: Encoder compresses input to low-dimensional bottleneck, decoder reconstructs. The bottleneck forces learning compact representations. Uses: dimensionality reduction, denoising, anomaly detection (high reconstruction error = anomaly).
key_insights: Architecture: Encoder $f: \mathbb{R}^D \to \mathbb{R}^d$ → Bottleneck $z \in \mathbb{R}^d$ → Decoder $g: \mathbb{R}^d \to \mathbb{R}^D$ where $d \ll D$
Loss = reconstruction error: $L = \|x - g(f(x))\|^2$. No labels needed — self-supervised.
Bottleneck forces compression: only the most important features survive. Like lossy compression.
If encoder + decoder are linear (no nonlinearity): autoencoder learns PCA. Nonlinearity → nonlinear generalization of PCA.
Anomaly detection: train on normal data only. Anomalies have high reconstruction error because the bottleneck didn't learn to represent them.
Denoising autoencoder: corrupt input $\tilde{x} = x + \text{noise}$, train to reconstruct clean $x$. Learns robust features.

mathematical_core.bottleneck_dim: $d \ll D$. Too small: lossy, can't reconstruct. Too large: identity mapping (no compression). Sweet spot depends on data intrinsic dimensionality.

derivations.title: Linear autoencoder = PCA

steps.name: Linear encoder/decoder
steps.math: $z = W_e x$, $\hat{x} = W_d z = W_d W_e x$. Minimize $\|x - W_d W_e x\|^2$.

steps.name: Optimal solution
steps.math: Columns of $W_e$ span the same subspace as top-$d$ eigenvectors of covariance matrix $X^\top X$. This is exactly PCA.

derivations.consequence: Nonlinear autoencoders learn nonlinear manifolds — strictly more powerful than PCA. But PCA is the linear baseline to beat.

geometric_properties: Bottleneck representation lies on a learned manifold in $\mathbb{R}^d$
Data reconstruction = projection onto the learned manifold + inverse mapping
statistical_properties: Reconstruction error distribution: normal data → low, anomalies → high (threshold for detection)
Bottleneck dim $d$: typically 2-10× smaller than input. For images: 256-512 from 224×224×3 = 150K.
numerical_properties: Training is stable (MSE loss, no adversarial dynamics)
Encoder and decoder can be any architecture: MLP, CNN, transformer

related: PRODUCTION.DISTILLATION — both compress knowledge into smaller representations
